blocker: Cursor agent shell fails to start (PowerShell LanguagePrimitives / exit -65536); cmd.exe also blocked in harness

static_refs_only_not_live.note: NÃO substitui inventário live de pendências

operator_capture_script: cd /d "E:\Chute de Ouro\goldeouro-backend" && git status --porcelain=v1 -uall > "%TEMP%\pe2m-hitl2-porcelain.txt" && git ls-files --others --exclude-standard > "%TEMP%\pe2m-hitl2-untracked.txt" && git stash list > "%TEMP%\pe2m-hitl2-stash.txt"
policy: PASS criteria require complete live inventory — FAIL until operator pastes or shell restored
